name: Infinity Jar - Concentrates
summary: The Infinity Jar, Concentrates (Vapman Edition) is a premium storage solution designed for herbal extracts and resins.
description: The Infinity Jar, Concentrates (Vapman Edition) is a premium storage solution designed for herbal extracts and resins. Crafted from UV-blocking violet glass with a natural walnut wood lid, it combines artisan aesthetics with functional precision. Built with violet UV-protective glass, the jar blocks harmful visible light while allowing beneficial UV-A rays to pass through, helping preserve potency, colour, and flavour naturally. The airtight walnut lid ensures odour-proof storage, keeping concentrates fresh, contained, and discreet. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.

specs.label: Material
specs.value: UV-protective violet glass, walnut wood lid
